user_query: On fathers third day, add a superfood breakfast

fields.name: Superfood Chia & Berry Bowl
fields.short_description: A nutrient-dense breakfast bowl of chia-seeded coconut yogurt topped with mixed berries, toasted nuts, seeds, and a drizzle of honey — high in omega-3s, fiber, and antioxidants.
fields.meal_suggestion: Stir 3 tablespoons of chia seeds into 1 cup of unsweetened coconut or Greek yogurt and let sit 10–15 minutes (or overnight) until thickened. Top with a mix of fresh or thawed blueberries, raspberries, and sliced strawberries. Add a tablespoon each of toasted walnuts and hemp seeds, a sprinkle of goji berries or cacao nibs, and a light drizzle of honey or maple syrup. Finish with a few mint leaves and a squeeze of lemon for brightness.
fields.nutrition_note: High in fiber and omega-3s from chia and walnuts; berries provide antioxidants and vitamin C; hemp seeds add plant-based protein and essential fatty acids; yogurt supplies calcium and probiotics. This bowl supports heart health, digestion, and sustained energy for the morning.

result.reasoning: Append a superfood breakfast to Father's Day 3 breakfast options (position -1). The chia & berry bowl complements the existing Whole-Grain Pancakes by providing a nutrient-dense, lighter alternative focused on omega-3s, fiber, and antioxidants.
